flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bethel University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 1.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bethel University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.1k → $44.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bethel University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.1k → $44.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bethel University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
